name: @tuanla90/plugin-pwa
description: Install NocoBase as a Progressive Web App on desktop and mobile (Add to Home Screen). Configure the app name, short name, theme/background colors and icon (upload one or auto-generate from the app name). Works on the classic and modern clients.
description.zh-CN: 让 NocoBase 可作为 PWA 安装到桌面和手机（添加到主屏幕 / 安装）。
